text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...Everybody at the castle used to say I was the
very best, which made me increasingly fond of
keep-ups.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I see. So the secret to your strength is the leg training
you've been perfecting since childhood?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You know, reminiscing about that has got
me longing for a good old kick-about. ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I know! Why don't we do it together? Let's see
who can keep the ball up the longest!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Go! Hup! Ahaha! It's been such a long time! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
(But my body doesn't feel the same as before... I
can't find my center... My body feels... heavy...)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Ah, I let the ball fall first.. Looks like that was, uhhh... 134 minutes.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And I managed 136 minutes... How close!
Although, I used to be able to keep the ball up
for five hours straight... Hm. It's certainly a task to
maintain both stamina and concentration...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Um, I'd like another shot at beating you
sometime! I'll show you what I can do with some
practice...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Sure thing! ♪ I'm ready whenever you are! I'd
better practice and trim up! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, after some serious training, Fine Motion
works herself back to her original weight.
